items.title: Respond to Barak (Opti) with Fin Capital's position on the Series A round
items.context: Email from Richie on Jun 16: Barak is closing a ~$16M round at ~$75-80M pre-money with Mayfield and YL Ventures co-leading. Proposed $4M allocation for Fin. Richie recommended leaning in at ~$2M. Team told Barak they'd 'bring terms back to the group and follow up with next steps.'

items.title: Follow up with Matt Polak (VanishID) on term sheet status in ~1 week
items.context: Email from matt@vanishid.com on Jun 18: 'We have been going back and forth on some term sheets. I hope to have an update in the next week or so.'

items.title: Prep for SMBC AD management meeting on June 24 re: SMBC Fin Atlas Beyond Fund
items.context: Calendar event 'SMBC AD management meeting about SMBC Fin Atlas Beyond Fund' on Jun 24 with 27 attendees from SMBC, Fin Capital, AtlasBeyond, and JRI-America.

items.title: Prep for Jake's meeting with Ron Blachar (Vivid Security) on June 23
items.context: Calendar event 'Jake Fuchs and Ron Blachar' on Jun 23 at 4pm ET with ron@vivid.security — appears to be a new company sourcing call via Grain.
